raw_text: Aryan Thakur 9867541809 |rn23thakur@gmail.com Education BITS Pilani Goa, India Bachelors of Engineering in Electronics and Instrumentation + Mechanical Aug. 2021  May 2026 Relevant Coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Operating Systems, Database Management Systems Experience Teaching Assistant Digital Design, Engineering Graphics BITS Pilani Goa, India Instructed on Verilog-based combinational/sequential logic design and AutoCAD LT for technical drafting. Taught orthographic projections, isometric views, and digital circuit simulation techniques. Research Intern June 2023  Aug. 2023 Indira Gandhi Centre for Atomic Research IGCAR Tamil Nadu, India Conducted CFD simulations for fire safety protocol design in nuclear power plant settings. Validated turbulence models and analyzed fire spread impact based on ignition location. Projects CPU Scheduling Algorithms Simulator  Object-Oriented Programming C++, OOP, STL Designed and implemented various CPU scheduling algorithms including FCFS, Round Robin, SJF, MLQ, and Priority Scheduling with aging. Applied OOP principles such as inheritance and polymorphism to build modular, reusable components for scheduling logic. Utilized data structures like priority queues, queues, and vectors to ensure efficient task handling with support for time slicing, preemption, and dynamic priority adjustment. Developed performance metrics such as turnaround time, waiting time, and CPU utilization, incorporating aging to mitigate starvation. Book Store Web Application  Full-Stack MERN Project MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js, Tailwind CSS Built a responsive full-stack Book Store application using the MERN stack to handle user interactions and backend operations. Developed RESTful APIs with Express and Mongoose for robust CRUD functionality and efficient data management. Designed an intuitive UI/UX using React and Tailwind CSS, incorporating book search, detail views, and interactive modals for enhanced user engagement. ThreadSketch: String Art Generator |Python, NumPy, Matplotlib, OpenCV Built an image-to-string-art converter that used the Radon Transform to detect edges and generate thread paths. Optimized the sequencing and placement of threads to balance visual quality and efficiency, and extended the tool to support multi-color rendering through CMYK layer decomposition. Extracurricular Activities Electronics and Robotics Club  Core Team Member Organized technical workshops, competitions, and hackathons focused on robotics and electronics. Led 3+ robotics projects, including an inverted pendulum robot and robotic arm prototype. Developed and implemented automation solutions using microcontrollers and embedded systems. Taught circuit design and microcontroller programming to 50+ students in club workshops. Basketball Led my school team to victory in the District Sports Office DSO Basketball Championship. Served as Captain of the hostel basketball team, guiding the team to the Interhostel Finals.
